name: math
description: Full 3D math library: vec2, vec3, vec4, mat4, quaternion, trig, interpolation, geometry — built for Khan Engine and Khan Studio
author: khandev1211-cpu

changelog.2.0.0: Added trig, vec2, vec3, vec4, mat4, quaternion, interpolation, geometry helpers
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — sqrt, pow, gcd, primes, factorial, mean
changelog.2.0.1: Fixed the same inline-block-body syntax issue, plus multi-line boolean expressions missing parentheses. Also: the compiler previously special-cased 'math' as a no-op import (assuming it meant only native math functions), so this package's code had never actually been compiled/tested until now.
